summary: Footer color legibility fix verified. All four column headings (TREATMENTS/COMPANY/SUPPORT/VISIT), Newsletter label, and Open in Maps link now render in high-contrast cream/light gold on the armadillo footer background. WCAG 4.5:1 passes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Footer legibility issue from iteration 2 fully resolved. No regressions observed in the visible footer/CTA/stats areas from screenshot.
